name: Signal
description: Beacon housings stacked through the dark, one lamp burning in each — every redraw relights a different window of color.

code.style: --lampy: @p(18%, 42%, 66%); --rule: ( /* housing and lamp share one emitted glow color */ --lamp: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 32%; top: 10%; width: 36%; height: 80%; border-radius: 12%; background: rgba(12, 13, 17, 0.85); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 calc(8px / @Y) rgba(120, 126, 138, 0.25); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 40%; width: 20%; top: var(--lampy); height: 16%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--lamp); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(140px / @Y) @var(--lamp); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
